title: Abacus AI Just Dropped AI SuperComputer With Claude And Gemini
summary: Abacus AI launched AI SuperComputer, an always-on cloud environment enabling AI agents to build, deploy, and run software with full system access including databases, storage, terminal, GitHub, and AWS integration. The platform bridges code generation and live deployment, allowing agents to move beyond generating code to actively managing applications in Ubuntu cloud environments.
